hints.text: The **only African country with fully blue plates** (newer Gen4 = white w/ a blue strip left)
Gen4 = silver/white **truck cab** (region-specific variants) + a black pickup near Dakar/Thies; Gen3 car has the **right mirror visible** (unique to Senegal)
Drives **right**; French-colonial infrastructure (bollards, poles, signs, road lines)
**French** is the main language (the other sub-Saharan SV countries use English)
White **km markers w/ a red top** (road number + distances; the farthest town is usually the biggest)
Town-entry signs = white w/ a **thick pink outline** and bold black town name
Simple black **lamps with a solar panel** on top are common
Coverage mostly west of Touba; north = flat arid savannah-desert (sparse faded trees); south of The Gambia = greener + palms; Diourbel = rural sandy roads
